rule_text: Bonus offers for casino-style or slot games must not be promoted to the DEU market; sports-betting bonuses are permitted subject to terms rules.
No claims of guaranteed winnings or risk-free gambling in any wording.
Live-casino products must not be promoted to the DEU market.
Any permitted sports-betting bonus must state its wagering requirement and expiry.
Odds boosts must state the base odds alongside the boosted odds.
The page must display an addiction-help notice and a minimum-age statement (18+).
Pages promoting deposit-based play must reference the cross-operator monthly deposit limit.
A page targeting the DEU market and promoting operators or offers must display a DEU licence reference line.
